mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL ( REQUEST_NO , PROCESS_SEQ , APPROVAL_STATUS_CD , ORIGINAL_USER_CD , ACTUAL_USER_CD , REQUEST_DESC , ACTION_DT , ACTION_CD , APPROVAL_GRADE_CD ) SELECT #{requestNo} AS REQUEST_NO , PROCESS_SEQ_NO AS PROCESS_SEQ , APPROVAL_STATUS_CD , CASE WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' THEN #{sessionUser.userCd} WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' THEN #{sessionUser.teamLeaderUid} ELSE '' END AS ORIGINAL_USER_CD , CASE WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' THEN #{sessionUser.userCd} WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' THEN #{teamLeader} ELSE '' END AS ACTUAL_USER_CD , CASE WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' THEN #{requestDesc} ELSE NULL END AS REQUEST_DESC , CASE WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END AS ACTION_DT , 'REQUEST' AS ACTION_CD , CASE WHEN APPROVAL_LINE_ID = 6 AND PROCESS_SEQ_NO = 2 THEN 'TL' ELSE '' END AS APPROVAL_GRADE_CD FROM DOCS_APPROVAL_LINE_DETAIL WHERE APPROVAL_LINE_ID = #{approvalLineId}
mapper.select:
SELECT fileInfo.OBJECT_ID AS objectId , BUSINESS_AREA_CD AS businessAreaCd , BUSINESS_TYPE_CD AS businessTypeCd , REV_NO AS revNo , APPLY_HOGI_NO AS applyHogiNo , ECN_NO AS ecnNo
, DOCUMENT_NO AS objectNo , DOCUMENT_NM AS objectNm , DOC_CLASS_NM2 AS objectClassNm2 , DOC_CLASS_CD2 AS objectClassCd2 , fileInfo.fileNo AS totalPageNo
, SW_VERSION_NO AS swVersionNo , SW_NO AS objectNo , SW_NM AS objectNm , SW_CLASS_NM2 AS objectClassNm2 , SW_CLASS_CD2 AS objectClassCd2 , PRODUCT_CD AS productCd
FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT product LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OBJECT_ID , MAX(FILE_NO) AS fileNo FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT_FILE GROUP BY OBJECT_ID ) fileInfo ON product.OBJECT_ID = fileInfo.OBJECT_ID
FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_SW LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OBJECT_ID , MAX(FILE_NO) AS fileNo FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_SW_FILE GROUP BY OBJECT_ID ) fileInfo ON product.OBJECT_ID = fileInfo.OBJECT_ID
WHERE fileInfo.OBJECT_ID IN (
#{requestInfo.objectId}
)
